# Angel

Monsters: Demons (../Monsters%20and%20Villains/Demons%203bf815864dfc4a56ad90365b197f7dd9.md), Supervillains (../Monsters%20and%20Villains/Supervillains%20e279a3db427941fea851e6a6e016ec61.md), Vampires (../Monsters%20and%20Villains/Vampires%2028458e628ba28010b6f3c878bd0c006a.md)
Motivations: Rag tag band of friends (../../Features/Rag%20tag%20band%20of%20friends%209092ace4d11741659a7633ee2707f0a9.md), Cozy horror (../../Features/Cozy%20horror%20e5cc80dc61ed4c629951cdf472b20b7a.md), Condescension (../../Features/Condescension%2067c614aebb6f4e749b434829a49bf624.md), Irony (../../Features/Irony%200a85bc33ac144718937789d5db7d793c.md), Hidden monsters living amongst us (../../Features/Hidden%20monsters%20living%20amongst%20us%20c2e7213525474f8bb2f8718d0f6cb2f1.md), Supernatural forces few people can see (../../Features/Supernatural%20forces%20few%20people%20can%20see%201dbf653b6a894de39bbc08de004b862f.md), Surreal (../../Features/Surreal%20cee6644b68094859bf1b17c5e7fd25de.md), Adventure (../../Features/Adventure%201d458e628ba28026830dfe3db74cba19.md), Locations with personality (../../Features/Locations%20with%20personality%201d458e628ba2805fbfbde594b4ccc002.md)

Wonder: 2

<aside>
💡 I would rate this as having a [Extended, fresh continuity](../../Data/Restrictions/Extended,%20fresh%20continuity%202e8c934529774ca3bb236738110e73cf.md), except it relies too frequently on overly depressing arcs to keep things fresh.

</aside>

<aside>
💡 While this was the earliest inspiration I had for adventuring as a business, now that I have more experience with agency life, I feel like Angel is a very thin, unrealistic example of agency life.

It feels like it is written by people with no first-hand experience and seems more influenced by other shows they have seen than real life.

</aside>
